// note: Project-level MCP override. This REPLACES the context7 plugin's MCP server definition so the Context7 API key actually reaches the server. The plugin ships context7 with no env block, and a top-level settings.json `env` is NOT documented to propagate into MCP subprocesses — so the key must live in the server's own `env` block, which is here. SAFE TO COMMIT: it carries a ${VAR} reference, never the key itself. Set the real key in your shell (export CONTEXT7_API_KEY=...) or .claude/settings.local.json before launching Claude Code. The ${CONTEXT7_API_KEY:} default is empty, so an unset key falls back cleanly to Context7's anonymous tier.
